title: hymenocallis guerreroensis
intro: Hymenocallis guerreroensis is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Hymenocallis, commonly known as the spider lily or hurricane lily. This plant has been traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to its root, which contains saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hymenocallis guerreroensis include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Hymenocallis guerreroensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
